message.content: Find and read the StoryBrowser component to understand the story card layout pattern (cover image, title, status badge, vote/read stats). Look in client/src/components/Stories/StoryBrowser/. Read the JSX and CSS files. I need the exact card markup and class names used for rendering story cards in a grid.

content.text: I'll search for the StoryBrowser component and examine its structure for story card layouts.
Now let me read the StoryBrowser JSX and CSS files:

Perfect! I have the complete StoryBrowser component with both JSX markup and CSS styling. Here's the exact card layout pattern: ## StoryCard Markup & Class Structure ### JSX Card Component (Lines 18-65 of StoryBrowser.jsx) The card uses a `motion.div` wrapper with the following structure: ```jsx
{story.cover_url ? ( ) : (
{/* Book icon SVG */}
)}

{story.title}

{author && (
{author.image_url && } {author.name}
)}
{STATUS_LABELS[story.status] || story.status} {(story.vote_count || 0)} votes · {(story.read_count || 0)} reads
{story.tags && story.tags.length > 0 && (
{story.tags.slice(0, 3).map(tag => ( {tag} ))}
)}
``` ### Grid Container (Line 149) ```jsx
{stories.map(story => ( ))}
``` ### CSS Class Names & Styling **Grid Container:** - `story-browser-grid` - 3-column grid (repeat(3, 1fr)), 16px gap; responsive to 2 columns on tablet/mobile **Card Container:** - `story-card` - Card wrapper, background: var(--bg-card), 1px border, 12px border-radius, cursor pointer, shadow on hover **Cover Image Section:** - `story-card-cover` - 3:4 aspect ratio, overflow hidden - `story-card-cover img` - width 100%, height 100%, object-fit: cover - `story-card-cover-placeholder` - Flexbox centered book icon (shown when no cover_url) **Info Section:** - `story-card-info` - Padding: 10px 12px 12px **Title:** - `story-card-title` - 0.88rem, weight 600, 2-line clamp, line-height 1.3 **Author:** - `story-card-author` - Flex row, gap 6px, font-size 0.75rem, margin-bottom 8px - `story-card-author-avatar` - 18px circle, object-fit: cover **Meta (Status Badge + Stats):** - `story-card-meta` - Flex row, gap 8px, wrappable, margin-bottom 6px - `story-status-badge story-status-${status}` - Dynamic class based on status (ongoing/completed/hiatus) - `story-card-stats` - Font-size 0.7rem, color: var(--text-muted); displays "{votes} votes · {reads} reads" **Tags:** - `story-card-tags` - Flex row, gap 4px, wrappable - `story-card-tag` - Padding 2px 7px, border-radius 10px, background: var(--bg-hover), font-size 0.65rem **File Locations:** - Component: `/C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Stories\StoryBrowser\StoryBrowser.jsx` - Styles: `/C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Stories\StoryBrowser\StoryBrowser.css`
